scene_1.title: The Kidnapping
scene_1.text: Victor came to the house. He took my Ethan away. He says he'll only return him if I give him everything I have. David, I don't have much time. You're my only hope. Please, find my baby and bring him back safely.

scene_1_police.title: Calling for Help
scene_1_police.text: We need evidence. Help us collect clues to build a case against Victor. Find phone records, fingerprints, and witness statements at the police station.

scene_1_trace.title: Signal Trace
scene_1_trace.text: We can trace Victor's signal through his phone. Decrypt the communication data by matching signal patterns. The more matches, the closer we get to his location.

scene_1_alone.title: Going Solo
scene_1_alone.text: I'm going alone. Victor won't expect help. I'll need to navigate his traps carefully and find Ethan without alerting him. Every move counts.

scene_2.title: The Investigation
scene_2.text: The first clue points toward Victor's factory. The rescue begins now.
